name: mcwiki-5_5_4
description: v0.6.0 (2026-05-27 fork): UE 5.5.4 vault target — 'mcwiki-5_5_4' MCP server (5.7.4 mcwiki MCP 와 공존). user_config.vault_root default = E:\\MCWiki_5_5_4. Karpathy-style LLM wiki vault for UE 5.5.4 (222 sources / 79 entities / 46 concepts / 44 synthesis / 8 governance meta). 20 tools - read_page / read_raw / read_index / read_log / list_pages / search / lint / stats / ingest_seed / write_page / append_log / synthesis_seed / synthesis_finalize / query_recap / git_status / git_pull / find_cross_link_broken / suggest_missing_cross_link / find_claim_conflict / find_stale_baseline. v0.5.5 (Cycle 5p #1): find_claim_conflict 한국어 단위 명사 (종/개/함정/대/회/호스트) false positive 자동 강등 — 숫자+단위 직전 객체 명사 추출 후 (keyword, object) 페어 매칭. 객체 명사 다르면 conflict 제외, 미식별 시 severity=low+note. Cycle 5m audit 4 false positive 자동 해결. v0.5.4 누적: kind enum '00_meta' alias. v0.5.3: suggest_missing 백링크 캐시 (60x). v0.5.2: find_cross_link_broken v0.3.3. v0.5.1: LLM mode rollback.
long_description: MCWiki is a personal knowledge vault built on the Karpathy LLM-wiki pattern (raw / wiki / schema 3-layer). The bundled MCP server exposes the vault to any MCP-aware client as resources plus 20 tools, including the full Baseline Grep System (Cycle 5j+5k+5l). v0.5.1 = heuristic only — 외부 의존성 없음. Vault covers Unreal Engine 5.5.4 (21 categories).

tools.name: list_pages
tools.description: List slugs in a wiki kind directory.

tools.name: read_page
tools.description: Return the full markdown of a wiki page.

tools.name: read_raw
tools.description: Return the full content of a file under raw/.

tools.name: write_page
tools.description: Create or update a wiki page (sources/entities/concepts/synthesis/index).

tools.name: query_recap
tools.description: Capsule a Q&A and route filing-back.

tools.name: find_cross_link_broken
tools.description: Validate [[wikilink]] targets. v0.3.3 (Cycle 5n #1): CLAUDE.md vault root .md 파일 인식 + #anchor 분리. v0.3.2: 00_meta + raw/docs prefix (lint.py 정합). Baseline Grep tool #1.

tools.name: suggest_missing_cross_link
tools.description: Backlink-based cross-link recommendation. v0.5.3 (Cycle 5n #3): 모듈 레벨 백링크 인덱스 캐시 — vault signature check 후 cache hit 시 ~60x 빠름 (vault 전체 batch 5초). confidence: high/med/low. Baseline Grep tool #2.

tools.name: find_claim_conflict
tools.description: Heuristic claim conflict detector. 4 claim 패턴 + 3 충돌 카테고리. v0.5.5 (Cycle 5p #1): 한국어 단위 명사 (종/개/함정/대/회/호스트) false positive 자동 강등 — 객체 명사 추출 후 (keyword, object) 페어 매칭. v0.5.1: LLM mode 제거 — heuristic only. Baseline Grep tool #3.

tools.name: find_stale_baseline
tools.description: Staleness detector. last_updated + dependent pages graph (default 90-day threshold). Baseline Grep tool #4.

vault_root.title: Vault root
vault_root.description: Absolute path to the MCWiki vault root.
